goal: Add a side-effect-free consume authority builder that records cockpit patch permit-consume authorization from ready consume preflight while keeping permit consume, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch permit consume preflight can produce a side-effect-free consume authorization artifact.
Consume authority id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Permit consume and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-115 preflighted cockpit patch permit consume without consuming the permit.
